name: Leviathan
detail1: - At the players position there will be an red circle, after a few seconds a leviathan will jump from the water to that red circle killing anything in it's path
detail2: - Leviathan is a chaos enemy and doesn't spawn in main game.
detail3: - Leviathan has a limit of 3 permanant Leviathan, and has no temporary cap.
deathmsg: "Victim was eaten." "It wasn't the sharks this time but Victim is gone." "A different fish got to Victim." "Victim died before Random hunted the Leviathan."
